question: What is the main theme of the song?
answer_ja: 恋愛物語

question: Who is the singer referring to when he says 'I found a girl'?
answer_ja: 彼の恋人

question: What does the singer say about their age when they fell in love?
answer_ja: 彼らはまだ子供だった

question: What does the singer hope to share someday?
answer_ja: 夢と希望

question: What does the singer say about carrying love and children?
options: They want to carry only secrets
They want to carry love and children of their own
They want to travel the world
answer_en: They want to carry love and children of their own
answer_zh: 他們想承載愛與自己的孩子
answer_ja: 彼らは愛と自分たちの子供を育てたい

question: What does the singer describe doing barefoot on the grass?
answer_ja: お気に入りの曲を聴いている

question: How does the singer describe the woman he found?
answer_zh: 比他認識的任何人都堅強
answer_ja: 彼が知っている誰よりも強い

question: What does the singer say about the future he sees?
options: He sees a future with the woman
He sees a future with friends
answer_en: He sees a future with the woman
answer_zh: 他看到與這位女性的未來
answer_ja: 彼はその女性との未来を見ている

question: What does the singer say about the woman looking perfect?
options: He thinks she looks perfect tonight
answer_en: He thinks she looks perfect tonight
answer_zh: 他認為她今晚看起來完美
answer_ja: 彼は彼女が今夜完璧に見えると思っている

question: What is the singer's feeling about deserving the woman?
options: He feels he doesn't deserve her
answer_en: He feels he doesn't deserve her
answer_zh: 他覺得自己不配擁有她
answer_ja: 彼は自分が彼女にふさわしくないと感じている

question: What does the singer say about the 'dolling' at the beginning?
options: The dolling just died right in
answer_en: The dolling just died right in
answer_ja: dollingはちょうど死んだ

question: What does the singer whisper underneath his breath?
answer_ja: 君はそれを聞いた、dolling 君

question: What does the singer say about their relationship status?
options: They are still kids but so in love
answer_en: They are still kids but so in love
answer_zh: 他們仍是孩子，但深愛著彼此
answer_ja: 彼らはまだ子供だが、とても愛し合っている

question: What does the singer say about fighting against odds?
options: They are fighting against all odds
answer_en: They are fighting against all odds
answer_ja: 彼らはあらゆる困難に立ち向かっている

question: What does the singer say about the heart of the dolling?
answer_ja: 君の心はとても嘘つきだ

question: What does the singer say about the eyes of the dolling?
answer_zh: 結束你的眼睛，你的希望
answer_ja: 君の目を閉じて、君の希望

question: What does the singer say about the time he will forgive?
options: I will forgive you of this time
answer_en: I will forgive you of this time
answer_ja: 今回だけは許すよ

question: What does the singer say about the favorite song?
options: They are listening to their favorite song
They are singing a new song
They are dancing to a song
answer_en: They are listening to their favorite song
answer_zh: 他們正在聽最喜歡的歌曲
answer_ja: 彼らはお気に入りの曲を聴いている

question: What does the singer say about the hand?
options: My hand, we might gonna be your man
answer_en: My hand, we might gonna be your man
answer_zh: 我的手，我們可能會成為你的男人
answer_ja: 私の手、私たちはあなたの男になるかもしれない

question: What does the singer say about having faith?
options: I have faith in what I see
answer_en: I have faith in what I see
answer_ja: 私は見たものを信じている

question: What does 'barefoot' mean in the song context?
answer_ja: 裸足で

question: What does 'forgive' mean in the line 'I will forgive you of this time'?
answer_ja: 怒りをやめる、許す

question: What does 'hope' mean in the song?
answer_ja: 期待の気持ち

question: What does 'perfect' mean in the phrase 'You look perfect tonight'?
answer_ja: 完璧な

question: What does 'share' mean in 'She shares my dreams'?
answer_ja: 一緒に持つまたは使う

question: What does 'faith' mean in 'I have faith in what I see'?
answer_ja: 信頼または信念

question: What does 'carry' mean in 'To carry love, to carry children'?
answer_ja: 持つまたは支える

question: What does 'between my arms' mean?
answer_ja: 私の腕の中に

question: What does 'listen' mean in 'We're listening to our favorite song'?
answer_ja: 音に注意を払う

question: What does 'kiss me slow' mean?
answer_ja: 優しくゆっくりキスする

question: How would you describe the feeling of 'falling in love' in your own words?
answer_ja: 強い感情的なつながり

question: What are some ways to show love to someone special?
answer_ja: 注意とケアを与える

question: Why is it important to have faith in a relationship?
answer_ja: それは信頼と希望を築く

question: How do you interpret the phrase 'barefoot on the grass' in a romantic context?
options: Feeling natural and free with someone
answer_en: Feeling natural and free with someone
answer_ja: 誰かと自然で自由な気持ち

question: What does 'fighting against all odds' mean to you in a relationship?
answer_ja: 一緒に困難を乗り越える

question: How would you express 'You look perfect tonight' to someone you love?
answer_zh: 真誠地讚美他們的外貌
answer_ja: 彼らの外見を誠実に褒める

question: Why might someone say 'I don't deserve this' in a relationship?
answer_ja: 愛に値しないと感じる

question: What does it mean to 'share dreams' with someone?
options: To have common goals and hopes
answer_en: To have common goals and hopes
answer_zh: 擁有共同的目標與希望
answer_ja: 共通の目標と希望を持つこと

question: How can listening to a favorite song together strengthen a relationship?
answer_ja: 共有の思い出と絆を作る

question: What does 'not knowing what it was' imply about young love?
answer_ja: 無邪気さと不確かさ
